Description: Schedule of port arrivals and departures for a vessel to track maintenance windows. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), portName (string), arrivalDate (date), departureDate (date optional), status (enum: planned, arrived, departed, cancelled), availableMaintenanceHours (number), description (string).

Maps specific machinery failure codes/categories to required STCW/crew competencies for continuous improvement. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), failureCategory (string), failureCode (string), requiredCompetency (string), stcwReference (string optional), recommendedTrainingHours (number), description (string).

Top-level tenant entity. Fields: organizationName (string), orgShortName (string unique, lowercase a-z0-9), roles (array<string> of role IDs/names), tenhexID (object {iv, encryptedData} optional), primaryAdminEmail (string, unique), secondaryAdminEmail (string, unique). Used as parent for Vessel, User, InventoryPart, etc.

Fleet vessel record. Fields: vesselName (string unique), vessel_IMO_Number (string unique), organizationID (string → Organization). Related to Machinery (via vesselID), InventoryLocation (via vesselID), Form/FormTemplate mappings, and ActivityWorkHistory (via vesselID).

Equipment installed on a vessel. Fields: vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), machineryName (string), machineryDescription (string optional), avgRunningHoursPerMonth (number optional), actualRunningHoursSinceLastMaintenance (number optional). Related to Component (machineryID), Activity (machineryID), InventoryPart.compatibleMachinery[].
Mapping collection listing machinery present on a vessel. Fields: vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), machineryID (array<ObjectId> → Machinery).

Hierarchical component under a machinery. Fields: machineryID (ObjectId → Machinery), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel, optional), parentComponentID (string/ObjectId optional → Component), componentName (string), sfiCode (string optional for SFI classification). Related to MaintenanceSchedule.components[] and ComponentActivity.componentID.

Associates one component to one or more activities, optionally vessel/schedule scoped. Fields: componentID (ObjectId → Component), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), maintenanceScheduleID (ObjectId → MaintenanceSchedule optional), activityIDs (array<ObjectId> → Activity).

Plan defining activities for a vessel. Fields: organizationID (string), shortName (string 8–16), vesselID (string → Vessel), components (array<ObjectId> → Component), maintenanceScheduleDescription (string), maintenanceScheduleRevisionHistory (array<ObjectId> → MaintenanceScheduleRevisionHistory), active (boolean), createdByUserID (string → User), lastUpdatedByUserID (string → User optional), userPermissions (array<{userID:string, permission:array<string>}>), sfiCode (string optional), minScheduleYear/maxScheduleYear (number optional).
Revisions applied to a MaintenanceSchedule. Fields: revisionDescription (string), createdByUserID (string/ObjectId → User).

Defines a planned maintenance job against machinery. Fields: machineryID (ObjectId → Machinery), maintenanceScheduleID (ObjectId → MaintenanceSchedule optional), description (string), intervalDuration (string nullable, e.g., '1000', '3'), intervalDurationType (enum: hours, months, years, days, weeks nullable), adhocInterval (string optional, e.g., 'voyage'), lastDoneOn (date optional), workHistory (array<ObjectId> → ActivityWorkHistory), expectedManHours (number optional), expectedCost (number optional), department (enum: Engine|Deck|Electrical|Catering|Operations|Supply|Other optional), needsPortStay (boolean default false), requireClassSurvey (boolean default false), allowClassSurveyException (boolean default false), isStatutoryCompliance (boolean default false), isCritical (boolean default false), requiredRank (string default 'any'), requiredCompetency (number 1-5 optional), requiresContractor (boolean default false), ptwConfig (object {isPTWRequired:boolean, ptwTypeIds:array<string>, ptwFormTemplateIDs:array<ObjectId>→FormTemplate}), requiredParts (array<{partID:ObjectId→InventoryPart, estimatedQuantity:number, isCritical:boolean}> default[]), estimatedPartsCost (number optional), maintenanceSteps (object optional: {notesHtml:string, documentIDs:array<ObjectId>→DocumentMetadata, updatedBy:ObjectId→User, updatedAt:date}).

Execution record for an Activity on a vessel/schedule. Fields: organizationID (string), maintenanceScheduleID (string → MaintenanceSchedule), activityID (string → Activity), vesselID (string → Vessel), _systemSet_seqNum (number optional), active (boolean default true latest), committed (boolean default false), classInspectionCompleted (boolean default false), events (array<ObjectId> → ActivityWorkHistoryEvent), plannedDueDate (date), previousDueDate (date optional), validatedForms (array<{formTemplateID:string, formData:mixed, validated:boolean, validatedAt:date?, validatedBy:string?, rejected:boolean, rejectedAt:date?, rejectedBy:string?}> default[]), estimatedManHours (number optional job-level estimate), ptwConfig (object {isPTWRequired:boolean, ptwTypeIds:array<string>, ptwFormTemplateIDs:array<ObjectId>→FormTemplate}), failure tracking: isFailureEvent (boolean), failureCategory (string), failureCode (string), impliedCompetencySignalIDs (array<string/ObjectId> → CrewCompetencySignal), isBlocked (boolean default false), blockageReasons (array<string>), blockedSince (date), triggerSource (object), failureCause (string optional), failureSeverity (enum minor|moderate|major|critical optional), isUnplannedMaintenance (boolean), requiresFollowUp (boolean), needsDrydock (boolean), isNonConformity (boolean), machineryRunningHours (number optional), relatedPartIDs (array<ObjectId> → InventoryPart default[]), childAWHIds (array<ObjectId> → ActivityWorkHistory), parentAWHId (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistory), downtime: hasDowntime (boolean), downtimeStartDate (date optional), downtimeEndDate (date optional), downtimeDescription (string optional), operationalImpact (enum none|minor|major|critical optional), latestEventID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistoryEvent)  , latestEventStatus (enum created, completed, missed, cancelled, rescheduled, in-progress, suspended), latestEventDate (date), latestEventDescription (string), latestEventPerformedBy (string → User), hasQualityErrors (boolean), qualityErrors (array<{code, category, severity, detectedBy, linkedFormID}> default[]), repairType (enum permanent|temporary|interim), temporaryFixExpiryDate (date).

Granular event within a work history. Fields: activityWorkHistoryID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistory), performedOn (date optional), performedBy (ObjectId → User optional), description (string optional), activityCompletionStatus (enum: created, completed, missed, cancelled, rescheduled, in-progress, suspended), maintenanceType (enum: routine, breakdown, unscheduled, survey, inspection, repair, modification, overhaul, refit, drydock, preventive, other), comments (string optional), documents (array<string> file paths optional), riskAssessment (string optional), damageDeficiency (string optional), actualManHours (number optional execution-level actual), crewMembersAssigned (array<ObjectId> → CrewMember default[]), specialComments (string optional), partsUsed (array<ObjectId> → MaintenancePartUsage), actualPartsCost (number optional).

Parts consumed/returned during a job event. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), activityWorkHistoryEventID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistoryEvent), partID (ObjectId → InventoryPart), quantityUsed (number ≥0), quantityReturned (number ≥0 default 0), fromLocationID (ObjectId → InventoryLocation), issuedBy (ObjectId → User), usedBy (ObjectId → User), unitCost (number ≥0 default 0), totalCost (number ≥0 default 0 auto-calculated), usageDate (date default now), comments (string optional).

Master data for spares/consumables. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), partNumber (string unique within org), partName (string), description (string optional), category (string optional), subcategory (string optional), sfiCode (string optional), unit (string default 'pcs'), reorderLevel (number≥0 default 0), maxStockLevel (number≥0 optional), leadTimeDays (number≥0 default 30), unitCost (number≥0 default 0), preferredVendorID (ObjectId → Vendor optional), alternativeVendors (array<ObjectId> → Vendor), substitutePartIDs (array<ObjectId> → InventoryPart), crossReferencePartNumbers (array<string>), specifications (object default {}), compatibleMachinery (array<ObjectId> → Machinery), isActive (boolean default true), isCritical (boolean default false), shelfLifeMonths (number≥0 optional), expiryDate (date optional), calibrationDueDate (date optional).

Where stock is stored or used. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), locationCode (string unique within org), locationName (string), locationType (enum: vessel_storage, shore_warehouse, workshop, work_site), description (string optional), parentLocationID (ObjectId → InventoryLocation optional), isActive (boolean default true), system (boolean default false).

Per-part per-location stock snapshot. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), partID (ObjectId → InventoryPart), locationID (ObjectId → InventoryLocation), currentQuantity (number≥0), reservedQuantity (number≥0), availableQuantity (number≥0 auto: current−reserved), lastCountDate (date optional), lastCountBy (ObjectId → User optional), averageMonthlyConsumption (number≥0 default 0). Unique by (organizationID, partID, locationID).

All inventory movements with linkage. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), partID (ObjectId → InventoryPart), transactionType (enum: receipt, issue, transfer, return), quantity (number; positive receipts, negative issues), fromLocationID (ObjectId → InventoryLocation optional), toLocationID (ObjectId → InventoryLocation optional), relatedActivityWorkHistoryID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistory optional), relatedActivityWorkHistoryEventID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistoryEvent optional), relatedPurchaseOrderID (ObjectId → PurchaseOrder optional), relatedReplenishOrderID (ObjectId → ReplenishOrder optional), performedBy (ObjectId → User), authorizedBy (ObjectId → User optional), unitCost (number≥0 default 0), totalCost (number default 0 auto = |quantity|*unitCost), reason (string optional), comments (string optional), documentReferences (array<string> optional), transactionDate (date default now).

Suppliers for parts/services. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vendorCode (string), vendorName (string), contactInfo (object {address, phone, email, contactPerson} optional), paymentTerms (string optional), leadTimeDays (number≥0 default 30), qualityRating (1–5 default 3), deliveryRating (1–5 default 3), isActive (boolean default true), specializations (array<string> e.g., 'Engine parts').

External purchase of parts. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), poNumber (string), vendorID (ObjectId → Vendor), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), status (enum: draft, sent, acknowledged, partial_received, completed, cancelled), orderDate (date default now), expectedDeliveryDate (date optional), actualDeliveryDate (date optional), orderedBy (ObjectId → User), approvedBy (ObjectId → User optional), totalAmount (number≥0 default 0), currency (string default 'USD'), lineItems (array<{partID:ObjectId→InventoryPart, quantity:number≥1, unitPrice:number≥0, totalPrice:number≥0, receivedQuantity:number≥0 default 0, urgency: enum normal|urgent|critical}>), deliveryLocation (string optional), specialInstructions (string optional), documents (array<string> file paths).

Internal replenishment to a location/vessel. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), orderNumber (string unique), itemID (ObjectId → InventoryPart), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), toLocationID (ObjectId → InventoryLocation), requestedQuantity (number > 0), receivedQuantity (number≥0 default 0), status (enum: requested, partial_received, fully_received, closed), requestedBy (ObjectId → User), remarks (string optional), purchaseOrderID (ObjectId → PurchaseOrder optional), documents (array<string>), createdAt/updatedAt (date), createdBy/updatedBy (ObjectId → User optional).

Legacy compatibility seed entry retained for user vocabulary that still refers to SFI codes/categories in the older shape. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), category (string like '101.' or '101.001'), name (string), level (number 1–5), parentCategory (string optional), description (string optional), isActive (boolean default true). Operationally this bridges older SFI-code phrasing used in questions and seed content, while the current backend-aligned hierarchy is modeled by SfiNode.

Allowed document categories per organization with dynamic custom fields. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), typeName (string unique per org), description (string optional), isActive (boolean default true), createdBy (ObjectId → User), updatedBy (ObjectId → User optional), fields (array<{fieldName, fieldLabel, fieldType enum text|date|number|dropdown|reference, isRequired:boolean default false, dropdownOptions:array<string>?, referenceModel enum Machinery|Component|Activity?, defaultValue:string?, helpText:string?, order:number default 0}> default []).

Document metadata and version lineage with custom metadata values. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), documentName (string), documentType (string name; see DocumentType), description (string optional), currentVersionId (ObjectId → DocumentFile optional), fileVersions (array<ObjectId> → DocumentFile), createdBy (ObjectId → User), updatedBy (ObjectId → User optional), status (enum: active, archived, draft default active), isDeleted (boolean default false), customMetadata (object default {}; keys match DocumentType.fields[].fieldName; values string|number|Date|ObjectId).

Physical file/version linked to DocumentMetadata. Fields: documentMetadataId (ObjectId → DocumentMetadata), version (string), versionDescription (string optional), fileName (string), originalFileName (string), fileSize (number), mimeType (string), gridFSFileId (ObjectId GridFS), uploadedBy (ObjectId → User), uploadedAt (date default now), approvedBy (ObjectId → User optional), approvedAt (date optional), previousVersionId (ObjectId → DocumentFile optional), isLatest (boolean), gridFSMetadata (object optional), isDeleted (boolean default false).

Organization tags that can be applied to multiple item types. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), tagName (string ≤16), tagColor (hex color string optional), taggedItems (array<{itemType enum: FormTemplate|Activity|ActivityWorkHistoryEvent|ActivityWorkHistory|Form|DocumentMetadata, itemID:ObjectId, taggedAt:date, taggedBy:ObjectId→User, inherited:boolean?, inheritedFrom:ObjectId?}> default[]), createdBy (ObjectId → User), updatedBy (ObjectId → User optional), system (boolean default false).

Definition of dynamic forms/checklists. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), name (string unique), description (string optional), createdByUserID (ObjectId → User), updatedByUserID (ObjectId → User optional), sections (array<{id,title,description?,columns:number,order:number}>), fields (array<{id,type enum text|textarea|number|dropdown|checkbox|radio|date|datetime|file|email|phone|availableFiles|staticLabel|dropdownFile, label, placeholder?, value?, required:boolean, order:number, sectionId, lineBreak:boolean, pageBreak:boolean, options?, validations?, helperText?, files?, onlyPastDates:boolean, fileKVPairId?, multiSelect:boolean}>), active (boolean default true), isSystemTemplate (boolean default false), isNonConformity (boolean default false), isPTW (boolean default false), ptwType (enum optional).

Backend form instance/schedule model used for vessel, crew, activity-linked, proxy, and adhoc operational forms. Fields: name (string), description (string optional), formTemplateID (ObjectId → FormTemplate), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), crewMemberID (ObjectId → CrewMember optional), organizationID (string), startDate (date), intervalValue (number optional), intervalUnit (enum: one_time, days, weeks, months, years optional), nextDueDate (date optional), status (enum: submitted, committed), formData (object), submittedBy (ObjectId → User optional), submittedAt (date optional), committedBy (ObjectId → User optional), committedAt (date optional), isProxy (boolean), activityMappingID (ObjectId → FormTemplateActivityMapping optional), activityWorkHistoryID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistory optional), proxyFormID (ObjectId → Form optional), vesselMappingID (ObjectId → FormTemplateVesselMapping optional), crewMappingID (ObjectId → FormTemplateCrewMapping optional), isAdhoc (boolean), templateSnapshot (object optional), createdByUserID (ObjectId → User), updatedByUserID (ObjectId → User optional).

Audit trail of form actions. Fields: formID (ObjectId → Form), actionType (enum: submit, commit, reject, reset), actionBy (ObjectId → User), actionAt (date default now), message (string optional), organizationID (string).

Defines a reusable sequence of vessel-specific forms. Key: sequenceID (string unique). Fields: description (string optional), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), createdByUserID (ObjectId → User), updatedByUserID (ObjectId → User optional), active (boolean default true). Query hint: Use case-insensitive regex on sequenceID for selection (e.g., '^noon').

Places a vessel mapping inside a sequence with an order and characteristic. Fields: sequenceID (ObjectId → FormSequence), vesselMappingID (ObjectId → FormTemplateVesselMapping), order (number≥1), characteristic (enum: minimum_once, atmost_once, optional), organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), createdByUserID (ObjectId → User), updatedByUserID (ObjectId → User optional). Query hint: For 'next to fill', derive currentOrder from items that have a Form with status ∈ ['submitted','committed'], then select next order (> currentOrder, wrap to first). Ignore characteristic for selection.

Tracks per-sequence cycles for runtime 'current step' semantics. Fields: sequenceID (ObjectId → FormSequence), cycleNumber (number≥1), organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), startedAt (date default now), completedAt (date optional), committedItems (array<ObjectId → FormTemplateVesselMapping>), allRequiredDone (boolean default false). Query hint: Prefer open cycle (completedAt==null) when present; otherwise fallback to historical forms to derive currentOrder.

Maps a form template to one or more activities at optional scopes (org-wide, vessel, schedule). Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), formTemplateID (ObjectId → FormTemplate), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), maintenanceScheduleID (ObjectId → MaintenanceSchedule optional), activityIDs (array<ObjectId> → Activity optional), requiredForStatuses (array<enum created|completed|missed|cancelled|rescheduled|in-progress|suspended> optional), isOptional (boolean default false), isMandatoryIfOverdue (boolean default false), excludeGlobalRiskForms (boolean default false), createdByUserID (ObjectId → User), updatedByUserID (ObjectId → User optional), plus helpful arrays for UI (activityDescriptions[], machineryComponentActivityText[]).

Assigns a form template to a vessel with recurrence. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), formTemplateID (ObjectId → FormTemplate), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), startDate (date), intervalValue (number>0), intervalUnit (enum: one_time, days, weeks, months, years), isAdhoc (boolean default false), createdByUserID (ObjectId → User), updatedByUserID (ObjectId → User optional).

CSV/lookup stored in GridFS for dropdowns, etc. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), id (string custom key), description (string optional), fileId (string GridFS ID), totalRows (number≥0), createdByUserID (ObjectId → User), updatedByUserID (ObjectId → User optional).

System user account. Fields: email (string unique), firstName (string), lastName (string), organizationID (string → Organization), status (enum active|inactive|suspended), roles (array<string>), lastLogin (date), createdAt (date), updatedAt (date).

Represents an individual crew member employed by the organization. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId -> Organization), firstName (string), lastName (string), rank (enum any|officer|engineer|rating|specialist), dateOfBirth (date optional), nationality (string optional), userID (ObjectId -> User optional), employmentStatus (enum active|off-hire|inactive), certificateDocumentIDs/documentIDs (array<ObjectId> -> DocumentMetadata), contractPeriods (array of {startDate, endDate?, position, vesselID:ObjectId->Vessel, documentIDs:array<ObjectId>->DocumentMetadata}), employmentHistory (array of {action: hired|off-hire|re-hired, date, reason?, performedBy:ObjectId->User?}).

Links a CrewMember to a vessel, maintenance schedule or activity during a time period. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId -> Organization), crewMemberID (ObjectId -> CrewMember), vesselID (ObjectId -> Vessel optional), maintenanceScheduleID (ObjectId -> MaintenanceSchedule optional), activityID (ObjectId -> Activity optional; exactly one of these scope IDs must be set), assignmentType (enum permanent|riding_crew|contractor), startDate (date), endDate (date optional), status (enum planned|active|completed|relieved), rank (enum from CrewMember.rank optional), role (string optional), shiftPatternID (ObjectId -> ShiftPattern optional).

Defines a reusable work/watch pattern for a vessel or organization. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId -> Organization), vesselID (ObjectId -> Vessel optional), patternName (string), patternType (enum watch|daywork|custom), shifts (array of {startTime:string HH:MM, endTime:string HH:MM, activityType:string}), applicableRanks (array<string>), isDefault (boolean default false). Used by CrewAssignment.shiftPatternID and work/rest planning.

Daily work/rest log for one crew member on a vessel. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId -> Organization), vesselID (ObjectId -> Vessel), crewMemberID (ObjectId -> CrewMember), date (date), workPeriods (array of {startTime:date, endTime:date, activityType:enum watchkeeping|maintenance|cargo_operations|administrative|training|emergency_drill|standby, activityDescription:string?, relatedActivityWorkHistoryID:ObjectId->ActivityWorkHistory?}), restPeriods (array of {startTime:date, endTime:date, restType:enum sleep|meal_break|personal_time}), totalWorkHours (number 0-24), totalRestHours (number 0-24), complianceStatus ({isCompliant:boolean, violations:array of {violationType, severity, description}}), exceptions (array of emergency/force_majeure/safety_critical records with compensatoryRestRequired/Provided fields), enteredBy (ObjectId -> User), enteredAt (date), verifiedBy (ObjectId -> User optional), verifiedAt (date optional).

Permit to Work authorization record for high-risk activities. Fields: ptwNumber (string unique), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), activityWorkHistoryID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistory optional), type (enum: hot_work, enclosed_space, cold_work, working_aloft, electrical_isolation, underwater_ops, other), location (string), description (string), validFrom (date), validTo (date), status (enum: DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, APPROVED, ACTIVE, CLOSED, REJECTED, CANCELLED, EXPIRED), approvals (array<{step, rankCode, crewAssignmentID, status, approvedAt, signature}>), documents (array<string> file paths), riskAssessmentIDs (array<ObjectId> → DocumentMetadata), responsibleOfficerAssignmentID (ObjectId → CrewAssignment), createdByAssignmentID (ObjectId → CrewAssignment optional), rejectionReason (string optional), issuedAt (date), closedAt (date optional).

Extra work/watch blocks assigned to crew. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), crewID (ObjectId → CrewMember), date (string YYYY-MM-DD), startTime (string HH:MM), endTime (string HH:MM), activityType (string default 'adhoc').

Daily recording of equipment running hours. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), maintenanceScheduleID (ObjectId → MaintenanceSchedule), machineryID (ObjectId → Machinery), date (date), runningHours (number), searchPortCode (string), destinationPortCode (string), additionalData (object), createdByUserID (ObjectId → User).

Backend SFI hierarchy node used for exact structured classification of ship systems, equipment, components, inventory, and document contexts. Fields: sfiCode (string unique), name (string), parentSfiCode (string), depth (number), isVirtual (boolean). Use this as the backend-accurate routing target when users ask for SFI tree lookups, descendants, parents, or node-level classification.

Quotation requests sent to vendors for parts. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), rfqNumber (string), status (enum: draft, sent, quotes_received, quote_selected, converted_to_po, cancelled), requestDate (date), responseDeadline (date), lineItems (array), vendors (array), selectedVendorID (ObjectId → Vendor), linkedPurchaseOrderID (ObjectId → PurchaseOrder), createdBy (ObjectId → User).

Assigns form templates to individual crew members with recurrence. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), formTemplateID (ObjectId → FormTemplate), crewMemberID (ObjectId → CrewMember), startDate (date), intervalValue (number), intervalUnit (enum), isAdhoc (boolean), createdByUserID (ObjectId → User).

Tracks reminder delivery state for upcoming and overdue maintenance work so users can see who was notified, when reminders were sent, and whether escalation is still active. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), userID (ObjectId → User), activityWorkHistoryID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistory), activityID (ObjectId → Activity), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel), plannedDueDate (date), beforeDueSent (boolean), beforeDueSentAt (date optional), overdueSentCount (number), lastOverdueSentAt (date optional), active (boolean).

Financial planning record for vessel or department spending across a defined month/period so maintenance, procurement, and operational costs can be planned, approved, and monitored. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), name (string), description (string optional), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), year (number), month (number optional), budgetPeriod ({startDate,endDate}), budgetType (string/enum), budgetCodeID (ObjectId → BudgetCode optional), allocatedAmount (number), revisedAllocation (number optional), costCenterID (ObjectId → CostCenter optional), department (string optional), currency (string), status (string/enum), createdBy (ObjectId → User).

Chart-of-accounts style coding structure used to group budgets, allocations, invoices, and maintenance spend under consistent financial headings. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), code (string), name (string), parentCodeID (ObjectId → BudgetCode optional), isActive (boolean).

Financial transaction ledger for commitments, accruals, actuals, reversals, and credits tied to purchase orders, invoices, maintenance work, and returns. Fields include organizationID, budgetID, budgetAllocationID, budgetCodeID, costCenterID, vesselID, referenceType (PO_LINE|AWH_PART|AWH_LABOUR|AWH_EXTERNAL|INVOICE|INVOICE_LINE|BUDGET_REVISION|MANUAL_ALLOCATION|RTV_LINE), transactionType (COMMITMENT|ACCRUAL|ACTUAL|REVERSAL|REVISION|RETURN_ACCRUAL|CREDIT_NOTE), amount, currency, reference IDs, notes, and audit timestamps.

Operational cost-allocation record connecting maintenance work, inventory usage, or external services to a budget, budget code, and cost center. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), activityWorkHistoryID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistory optional), inventoryTransactionID (ObjectId → InventoryTransaction optional), serviceProvider (string optional), isAdHoc (boolean), serviceItems (array optional), budgetID (ObjectId → Budget), budgetCodeID (ObjectId → BudgetCode), costCenterID (ObjectId → CostCenter optional), estimatedCost (number), actualCost (number optional), currency (string), description (string optional), allocatedBy (ObjectId → User), notes (string optional), status (string/enum), allocationType (string/enum).

Audit trail for budget changes so finance and operations teams can trace status movements, revised allocations, reasons, and who made each update. Fields: budgetID (ObjectId → Budget), organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), modifiedBy (ObjectId → User), modifiedAt (date), budgetStatus (string/enum), changeReason (string optional), changeType (string/enum), changedFields (array), metadata (object optional).

Audit trail for budget allocation edits so the business can explain estimated-vs-actual changes, reassignments, and approval history on individual allocations. Fields: allocationID (ObjectId → BudgetAllocation), organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), modifiedBy (ObjectId → User), modifiedAt (date), changeType (string/enum), changedFields (array), metadata (object optional).

Organizational accounting unit used to group operational spend by department, vessel function, or reporting responsibility. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), code (string), name (string), isActive (boolean).

Structured competency requirement signal used to map crew evidence to operational readiness, certification expectations, and familiarization or endorsement checks. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), signalID (string), label (string), sections (array/object), mapsToRequirementIDs (array of requirement IDs such as medical, basicSafety, deckOfficerCoc, engineOfficerCoc, tankerBasic, tankerAdvanced, gasBasic, gasAdvanced, passengerBasic, passengerAdvanced, igfBasic, igfAdvanced, polarBasic, polarAdvanced, offshoreFamiliarization, dpWatchkeeping, tugFamiliarization), sortOrder (number), isActive (boolean), createdBy (ObjectId → User), updatedBy (ObjectId → User optional).

Supplier invoice record tied to procurement, maintenance work, and budget allocation so payable amounts, approvals, settlement, and document evidence can be tracked. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), purchaseOrderID (ObjectId → PurchaseOrder optional), activityWorkHistoryID (ObjectId → ActivityWorkHistory optional), budgetAllocationID (ObjectId → BudgetAllocation optional), budgetID (ObjectId → Budget optional), budgetCodeID (ObjectId → BudgetCode optional), costCenterID (ObjectId → CostCenter optional), invoiceNumber (string), invoiceDate (date), dueDate (date optional), currency (string), lineItems (array), subTotal (number), taxAmount (number), totalAmount (number), status (string/enum), paymentDate (date optional), paymentReference (string optional), approvedBy/approvedAt, settledBy/settledAt, documents (array), remarks (string optional), cancellationReason (string optional), cancelledAt (date optional), processedBy (ObjectId → User optional).

Inbound logistics/receipt record for items landed to a vessel or location so procurement fulfillment, receipts, and supporting documents can be tracked. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), orderNumber (string), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), fromLocationID (ObjectId → InventoryLocation optional), portLocation (string optional), status (string/enum), lineItems (array), requestedBy (ObjectId → User optional), receivedBy (ObjectId → User optional), documents (array), remarks (string optional).

Audit trail for landing order status and field changes so receipt confirmations, reversals, and document adjustments can be explained later. Fields: landingOrderID (ObjectId → LandingOrder), organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), modifiedBy (ObjectId → User), modifiedAt (date), status (string/enum), changeReason (string optional), changeType (string/enum), changedFields (array), metadata (object optional).

Outbound return-to-vendor record for defective, excess, or rejected items so quantities, credit-note follow-up, disposition, and related logistics can be traced. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), returnNumber (string), purchaseOrderID (ObjectId → PurchaseOrder optional), vendorID (ObjectId → Vendor optional), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), vendorRMANumber (string optional), vendorRMAReceivedDate (date optional), landingOrderID (ObjectId → LandingOrder optional), lineItems (array with returnedQuantity, unitPrice, totalValue, returnReason, itemCondition, packagingCondition, budgetID, budgetCodeID, costCenterID, fromLocationID, inventoryTransactionID, disposition, creditNoteNumber, creditAmount, status and related evidence), status (string/enum), totalReturnValue (number), currency (string), gatePassNumber (string optional), gatePassDate (date optional), submitted/approved/rejected fields, remarks, documents.

Audit trail for return-order approval, rejection, status, and disposition changes so vendor returns and credit recovery are fully traceable. Fields: returnOrderID (ObjectId → ReturnOrder), organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), modifiedBy (ObjectId → User), modifiedAt (date), status (string/enum), changeReason (string optional), changeType (string/enum), changedFields (array), metadata (object optional).

Audit history for purchase order status and field changes so procurement teams can explain approvals, amendments, cancellations, and delivery-date revisions. Fields: poID (ObjectId → PurchaseOrder), organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), modifiedBy (ObjectId → User), modifiedAt (date), poStatus (string/enum), changeReason (string optional), changeType (string/enum), changedFields (array), metadata (object optional).

Saved-search definition used to persist frequently used query presets for maintenance, inventory, procurement, crew, or compliance follow-up. Fields: organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), searchName (string), searchParameters (object), createdBy (ObjectId → User), updatedBy (ObjectId → User optional).

Queued file-upload tracking record used to monitor incomplete or retryable uploads for documents, forms, and evidence attachments. Fields: fileId (string), bucketName (string), filename (string), contentType (string), sliceID (ObjectId/string optional), organizationID (ObjectId → Organization), vesselID (ObjectId → Vessel optional), sourceInstanceID (ObjectId/string optional), metadata (object optional), uploadAttempts (number), maxRetries (number), lastAttemptAt (date optional), lastError (string optional), status (string/enum), completedAt (date optional), priority (number/string optional).
